TechnologyStack.Language: TypeScript 5.6+ (ES2022 target, ESNext modules, bundler moduleResolution)
TechnologyStack.Framework: Obsidian Plugin API (latest) + Chrome Extension APIs (MV3)

dep.name: zod
dep.purpose: Runtime schema validation for CapturePackage, ResultReport, and settings models

dep.name: dayjs
dep.purpose: Date formatting in templates and frontmatter

dep.name: defuddle
dep.purpose: Article content extraction from web pages

dep.name: esbuild
dep.purpose: Bundling for Obsidian plugin and clipper extension

constraint.reason: Project uses ES2022 target and bundler moduleResolution
Shared validation schemas depend on Zod 3 API surface

module-level.focus: Fast deterministic unit and contract checks per package

wave-level.focus: Cross-package integration surfaces touched by current wave

phase-level.focus: Full monorepo regression across all packages

Testing.mocking-policy: Prefer fakes and narrow stubs over broad monkey-patching. Use jsdom for DOM-related clipper tests. Mock Obsidian API minimally in plugin tests.

Observability.redaction: Never log secrets, credentials, cookies, auth headers, session tokens, or raw high-risk payloads. Redact query strings in diagnostic URLs.

DeliveryShape.shape: Local-only monorepo. Browser extension distributed as Chrome/Edge MV3 extension. Obsidian plugin distributed as manual-install .zip. No cloud backend, no server-side components.
